Order: (403) 275-2722

15–25 min delivery

Pizza Delivery in North Haven — From Your Neighborhood Pizzeria

Lower North Haven was developed between 1962 and 1971 — established homes, mature trees, and a quiet walk from our Thorncliffe kitchen.

Call (403) 275-2722 Order via Skip

Why North Haven Orders TOPS

North Haven residents led the grassroots fight in the 1970s to protect Nose Hill Park from development — that legacy is the green space that still anchors the whole NW.

Local Landmarks We Deliver Near

  • 📍 Nose Hill Park
  • 📍 North Haven Community Association
  • 📍 Nose Hill stone circle (Indigenous heritage site)

What North Haven Orders

TOPS Original. The Thorncliffe. The Spartan. Meat Lovers. After 51 years feeding NW Calgary, we know what works. See the full pizza menu →.

What We Deliver

  • 🍕 Signature & classic pizzas (hand-tossed, gluten-free crust available on mediums)
  • 🍗 Wings — 31 flavours, baked or breaded
  • 🍔 Burgers, sandwiches & donairs
  • 🍝 Pastas & TOPS Classics
  • 🥗 Salads & soups
  • 🧁 Desserts

Phone Order Direct (Best for In-House Delivery)

Calling us directly puts your order in front of our in-house driver. We answer the phone — no app, no menu confusion. (403) 275-2722.

Or Order Via Skip, Uber Eats, or DoorDash

We’re on all three. Pricing is the same on-site as in-store; delivery times depend on the courier.

  • Skip the Dishes
  • Uber Eats
  • DoorDash

Hours

  • Monday11 AM – 12 AM
  • Tuesday10 AM – 1 AM
  • Wednesday10 AM – 1 AM
  • Thursday10 AM – 1 AM
  • Friday10 AM – 2 AM
  • Saturday10 AM – 2 AM
  • Sunday11 AM – 12 AM

Kitchen sometimes closes a few minutes before posted close — call to confirm if it’s late.
